Html:
I got a build error when I try to run debug the original code that I just downloaded.  Please help.

 

 

Server Error in '/TailspinSpyworks' Application.

Parser Error

Description: An error occurred during the parsing of a resource required to service this request. Please review the following specific parse error details and modify your source file appropriately.

Parser Error Message: Could not load type 'TailspinSpyworks.SiteMaster'.

Source Error: 

Line 1:  <%@ Master Language="C#" AutoEventWireup="true" CodeBehind="Site.master.cs" Inherits="TailspinSpyworks.SiteMaster" %>
Line 2:  <!DOCTYPE html PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD XHTML 1.0 Strict//EN" "http://www.w3.org/TR/xhtml1/DTD/xhtml1-strict.dtd">
Line 3:  <html xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xml:lang="en">


Source File: /TailspinSpyworks/Styles/Site.master    Line: 1

 

Thanks.

Is the masterpage there ?

Make sure your download was not corrupt and build the project before you run.

Joe

I got this error. actually namespace name TailspinSpyworks contains an underscore between these two words. Open the Site.Master.cs file you will notice that namespace name has an underscore between two words. 

Place an underscore between word Tailspin and Spyworks. it will work fine
